parsed.tier_rationale: Only one primary study (PMC6094952) addresses T cells: genetic and pharmacologic EZH2 disruption causally reprograms the suppressive program of tumor-infiltrating Tregs, i.e., causal evidence in a related inhibitory T cell context. However it demonstrates no direct proximal TCR signalling inhibition, checkpoint, or TCR-linked anergy experiment, so strong is not met. This fits the moderate criterion (causal evidence in a related inhibitory T cell context but not a direct TCR inhibition experiment). All other papers are non-T-cell oncology studies or a review that cannot support a tier.
